turns.assistantContent:
Done. Updated `opencode.json` with reasoning/thinking summary configurations for:

| Provider | Model | Setting |
|----------|-------|---------|
| **minimax** | M2.7 (current) | `thinking.type: enabled`, `budgetTokens: 16000`, `reasoningSummary: auto` |
| **openai** | gpt-5.4, gpt-5.2, gpt-5.1-codex | `reasoningEffort: high`, `reasoningSummary: auto`, `include: ["reasoning"]` |
| **anthropic** | claude-opus-4.5, claude-sonnet-4.5 | `thinking.type: enabled`, `budgetTokens: 16000` |
| **google** | gemini-3-pro | `thinking.type: enabled`, `budgetTokens: 16000`, `reasoningSummary: auto` |

This ensures all thinking/reasoning outputs will include summary metadata for session exports.
